title: Baby Sweetheart by Battat – Feeding Time 12-Inch Doll for Newborn with Soft Body & Easy – to – Read Story Book and Accessories
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Cuddle-Soft Body: Baby Sweetheart is a huggable and soft baby doll with an adorable newborn look. Their cuddly polyester body and 30cm size make Baby Sweetheart the perfect baby dolls for toddlers to easily carry with them and care for. Baby Sweetheart can be a boy or a girl, it’s up to you!
Realistic Details: Baby Sweetheart Feeding Time has beautiful bright-blue eyes, rosy round cheeks, and a mouth shaped perfectly for a bottle or a thumb.

Read and Play: Each Baby Sweetheart comes with an easy-to-read themed storybook so you can practice reading your newborn doll to sleep! The beautiful hand-painted illustrations help the story come to life. Practice feeding your cuddly soft doll with a special baby bottle, dish, and spoon. Includes: (1) 12" doll wearing attached onesie and bow, (1) storybook, (1) dish, (1) spoon, (1) baby bottle
Age Range: Baby Sweetheart is suitable for children age 2 years old and up.
Cleaning and Care: Durable vinyl head, arms, and legs can be easily wiped-clean. The polyester onesie can be spot-cleaned with warm water and mild soap.
description: From the manufacturer Baby Sweetheart - Feeding Time A realistic, soft baby doll with colorful accessories. Read to your doll from the picture book "The Magic Spoon" to help your Baby Sweetheart fall asleep. The baby doll is wearing a yellow romper and has bright blue eyes. Includes: Baby doll with romper and bow Picture book Bowl Spoon Bottle Learning Through Care Imaginary play is one of the best ways to develop important social skills. Baby Sweetheart's soft and cuddly body and realistic details encourage nurturing and learning how to care for others. For children expecting a new sibling, Baby Sweetheart can be the perfect practice for learning how to safely care for a new baby. The perfect baby dolls for toddlers age 2 years old and up, Baby Sweetheart will bring joy to children of any age! Story Time - Reading Skills Each Baby Sweetheart doll comes with an easy-to-read storybook filled with beautiful hand-painted illustrations. Practice reading skills with the simple and fun language in the illustrated storybook. Reading to baby's first doll encourages them to learn new words, and reading to your child and their doll is a great bonding moment for parents. With the colorful illustrations, your child can also imagine their own stories to tell to baby. Collect Them All! Discover all the ways to care for a new baby with the Baby Sweetheart collection, each available on Amazon! Help your child practice caring for others while exploring the pretend-play themes of Feeding Time, Bed Time, Bath Time, and Medical Time. With a storybook for each theme and matching accessories, your child will develop their imagination with hours of play and fun! Baby Sweetheart is recommended for children aged 2 years old and up, and provides fun for children through a range of ages. These dolls are an excellent gift for 2-year-old girls, and are a special favorite doll for 4-year-olds. Watch your child develop at any age as they adapt their doll play to new scenarios!
